title: Smokey Roasted Bramley Apple Wrap
description: This kid-friendly Ethiopian dish features yeasty, bouncy-apple wraps that are perfect for a quick and healthy snack or meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix flour and baking powder together.
Add agar-agar and canola oil; stir until smooth.
Gently fold in Bramley apples, ensuring not to overmix.
Divide the dough into 4 equal portions. Roll each portion into circles approximately 1 inch thick.
Brush a bit of sugar-free jam on one side of each circle. Place another circle on top as a wrap and press edges together to seal.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with additional sugar-free jam if desired.
